title: Golden Palace — Consulting & Investment
supplier_p1: The fundamental condition for gaining a competitive advantage in the global market is establishing a reliable and sustainable supply chain. As a consulting firm, we optimize costs and guarantee quality at every stage, from production processes to raw material procurement.
supplier_p2: Thanks to our extensive network in the Turkish market, we identify the most suitable manufacturers for your sector and conduct capacity and quality control analyses. Our goal is not just to find a supplier, but to build long-term strategic partnerships for your company.
supplier_li_1: Research and pre-screening of potential manufacturers.
supplier_li_3: Legal management of price negotiations and contract processes.
supplier_li_4: Quality control during production and final pre-shipment inspections.
supplier_tagline: The right manufacturer is the first step to a profitable future.
market_p1: We minimize bureaucratic obstacles for foreign or local investors wishing to step into the Turkish market. We offer strategic guidance to build your company's legal, financial, and operational infrastructure on the most solid foundations.
market_p2: We provide end-to-end services, from market research to feasibility reports, from company registration to tax consulting. We ensure you start your commercial activities swiftly with the right steps, without losing time and money.
market_li_1: Preparation of market analysis, competition research, and sectoral feasibility reports.
market_li_2: Management of Joint Stock, LLC, or branch/liaison office establishment procedures.
market_li_3: Tax, accounting, and local regulation compliance consulting.
market_li_4: Establishment of work permits, payroll, and human resources infrastructure.
market_tagline: A right start is the key to sustainable growth.
local_p1: Eliminating the challenges of remote management, we act as your eyes and ears on the ground for your operations in Turkey. We ensure your business proceeds uninterrupted and flawlessly in situations where your physical presence is not required.
local_p2: We professionally coordinate all local processes on your behalf, from customs procedures to logistics organization, from document tracking in official offices to fair participations.
local_li_1: On-site coordination of customs, shipping, and warehousing operations.
local_li_2: Business and document tracking with official institutions, banks, and local authorities.
local_li_3: Temporary office services, business meetings, and fair booth organizations.
local_li_4: Immediate response to emergencies, problem-solving, and on-site crisis management.
local_tagline: Distances shouldn't hinder your business; we are on the field for you.
risk_p1: Trust is essential in commercial relations, but it is not enough. Detailed analysis of financial and legal risks before agreeing with a new business partner, supplier, or customer is the most effective way to protect your investments.
risk_p2: With our expert team, we conduct background checks (Due Diligence) of the individuals or institutions you plan to work with, reporting potential commercial risks, financial statuses, and market reputation levels, enabling you to take secure steps.
risk_li_1: Detailed financial and legal intelligence of suppliers, dealers, or business partners.
risk_li_2: Company history, partnership structures, and reputation research (Background Check).
risk_li_3: Confirmation of declared capacity and physical assets through site visits.
risk_li_4: Contract risk analysis and protective consulting against potential commercial disputes.
risk_tagline: Foresee the risks, secure your investments.
comm_p1: Positioning your brand accurately in the Turkish market and establishing strong relationships with local stakeholders is the foundation of commercial success. We represent your company at the highest level and professionally manage your corporate communication processes.
comm_p2: Eliminating language barriers and cultural differences, we build a solid bridge between you and your suppliers, customers, or government institutions. We attend critical meetings on your behalf, protecting your rights and brand reputation.
comm_li_1: Professional representation and translation services in B2B meetings.
comm_li_2: Brand communication and public relations (PR) support in the local market.
comm_li_3: Strategic consulting and corporate spokespersonship in critical price negotiations.
comm_li_4: Accelerating business processes with cultural compliance consulting.
comm_tagline: A strong business partner that represents you as well as you do.
contact_info_address_p: Mimar Sinan Ave. No: 42/A, Golden Palace Tower Floor: 12, Istanbul/Turkey
footer_copyright: © 2026 Golden Palace Consulting. All rights reserved.
slide_1_desc: We establish a reliable and sustainable supply chain for you to gain a competitive advantage in the global market.
slide_2_desc: We build your company's legal, financial, and operational infrastructure on the most solid foundations.
slide_3_desc: Eliminating the challenges of remote management, we become your eyes on the field for your operations.
slide_4_desc: We analyze potential commercial risks and report market reputation levels, allowing you to take secure steps.
